data.title: ProRx Pharma launches needle-free oral testosterone option for telemedicine providers; Eases TRT delivery at scale.
data.description: A liquid delivery system has been introduced by ProRx Pharma, a health and wellness 503B outsourcing facility based in EXTON, Pa., on Jan. 21, 2026. This system allows telemedicine providers to effectively administer Testosterone Replacement Therapy (TRT) in a safe and scalable manner. The company's oral testosterone product is now commercially available for use.

data.title: Flintridge Sacred Heart Academy receives $5 million gift from alumna Janet Hart Mitchell, establishing scholarship for students in need.
data.description: A scholarship to assist financially disadvantaged students has been established at Flintridge Sacred Heart Academy (FSHA) in LA CAÑADA FLINTRIDGE, Calif. The school recently received a substantial donation of $5 million from the estate of former student Janet Hart Mitchell, who graduated in the Class of 1948. This significant gift will provide necessary support for students in need of financial assistance to pursue their education at FSHA.

data.title: Deadline for investors in StubHub Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: STUB) to contact Berger Montague firm is January 23, 2026, for a class action lawsuit against the company.
data.description: Philadelphia-based law firm Berger Montague PC has recently revealed the filing of a class action lawsuit against StubHub Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: STUB). This lawsuit is on behalf of investors who bought or acquired StubHub shares. The action was initiated on January 21, 2026, and underscores significant legal ramifications against the Company. This development highlights a growing concern in the investor community about their investments in StubHub.

data.title: Kunes Auto & RV Group from DELAVAN, Wis. named to 2025 RVBusiness Top 50 Dealer Awards, showcasing top dealers.
data.description: In Delavan, Wisconsin on January 21, 2026, Kunes Auto & RV Group, a rapidly expanding dealership group in the Midwest, has secured a spot on the prestigious 2025 RVBusiness Top 50 Dealer Awards list. This accolade recognizes outstanding RV dealerships across the country.

data.title: US children gaining access to dental care with Dentistry.One & America's ToothFairy partnership. SmileScan™, an AI-powered scan, will identify oral health concerns.
data.description: Dentistry.One, a virtual-first dental care provider based in Metuchen, New Jersey, has introduced SmileScan™, a complimentary AI-driven oral health scan for families. This innovative tool can detect potential oral issues and deliver a comprehensive oral health rating. The announcement was made on January 21, 2026.

data.title: Filmland Spirits launches The Filmologist™, an AI bartender, entertaining and informing customers. Los Angeles, Jan. 21, 2026.
data.description: A popular bourbon brand has revolutionized its approach by utilizing artificial intelligence to engage with consumers. Recently, Filmland Spirits unveiled The Filmologist™, described as a witty bartender who provides entertainment, information, and even playful insults to fans. This innovative move occurred on January 21, 2026 in Los Angeles, marking a significant shift in how the brand interacts with its audience. The AI-infused persona is expected to create a unique experience for customers, showcasing the brand's commitment to staying ahead in the industry.

data.title: KidsChoice receives majority investment from Aquitaine Capital, supporting growth and clinical excellence.
data.description: In a recent development on January 21, 2026, KidsChoice, a company situated in Oklahoma City offering autism and pediatric therapy services, disclosed that they have received a significant majority investment from Aquitaine Capital, a private equity firm owned by women. This investment from Aquitaine Capital will provide KidsChoice with a substantial boost in capital and operating assistance.

data.title: dxFeed reported 27% revenue growth in 2025, marking a decade of sustained expansion in the global financial industry.
data.description: Market data solutions and index management provider, dxFeed, revealed robust financial and operational performance for 2025 with a significant 27% increase in annual revenue compared to the previous year. The company has been consistently growing for over a decade.
